name: ClientMilestoneProgress
description: Per-client progress on a StageMilestone. CLIENT-READABLE: carries a scalar ownerEmail (= parent Client.ownerEmail) set by the writer on create, so the SAME manual role-aware RowPolicy as Clients applies (App Settings -> Table Permissions): staff roles pass through; Client/Funder see only rows where ownerEmail == {{user.email}}. Policies are configured manually, NOT in this artifact.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Item created at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Item updated at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: startedDate

columns.name: ownerEmail
columns.description: Scalar row-scope owner (= parent Client.ownerEmail), set on create. Drives the manual RowPolicy for client isolation.

columns.name: clientComment
columns.description: Client-entered comment on this milestone; separate from staff 'notes'. Client-writable ONLY via the UpsertMyMilestoneProgress code action (whitelisted status + clientComment).
